title: Contract Review RAG
summary: Search clauses, compare obligations, and answer grounded contract questions for review teams.

sample_features.query: Summarize the highest priority risk and recommended next step.

knowledge_base: Contract Review RAG is positioned as a LegalTech starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Search clauses, compare obligations, and answer grounded contract questions for review teams.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on legal, contracts, rag.
